# gigahost_server_catalog (Data Source)

Lists the hourly cloud server catalog: tiers, products, and regions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "gigahost_server_catalog" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `currency` (String) Currency of the catalog pricing.
- `regions` (Attributes List) Regions servers can be deployed in. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))
- `tiers` (Attributes List) Server product tiers available for hourly deployment. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tiers))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `region_active` (Boolean) Whether the region is active.
- `region_country` (String) Region country.
- `region_id` (String) Region id.
- `region_name` (String) Region name.
- `region_name_short` (String) Short region name.


<a id="nestedatt--tiers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tiers`

Read-Only:

- `group_id` (Number) Tier (product group) id.
- `group_name` (String) Tier name.
- `products` (Attributes List) Products in the tier. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tiers--products))

<a id="nestedatt--tiers--products"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tiers.products`

Read-Only:

- `price_id` (Number) Price id for the product, used when deploying.
- `product_hash` (String) Product hash.
- `product_id` (Number) Product id, used when deploying.
- `product_name` (String) Product name.
- `rate_hourly` (Number) Hourly rate.
- `rate_monthly` (Number) Monthly cap (the most charged per month).
- `region_ids` (List of Number) Ids of the regions this product can be deployed in.
- `vm_bw` (String) Bandwidth allowance.
- `vm_bw_type` (String) Bandwidth allowance type.
- `vm_cores` (String) Number of virtual CPU cores.
- `vm_memory` (String) Memory, in GB.
- `vm_storage` (String) Storage, in GB.
